creator: philip@eilio.com
text:
All of the files in /usr/share/doc/FAQ are not in english.
It appears to be spanish.  I have downloaded the doc distribution
from both ftp6 and ftp and gotten the same results.

The handbook and other areas aren't affected.

The gzipped version of the FAQ available on the website is in
English.

Fix: 

Replace the 2.2.8-RELEASE doc/FAQ portion with the gzipped version?
How-To-Repeat: ftp to ftp.freebsd.org.
cd to the 2.2.8-RELEASE directory.
get doc.tar
extract it.
Look at the files in the FAQ directory.
